---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

![](assets/images/yesimfoto.jpeg){fig-align="center" width="200"}

# Education 

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Eskisehir Osmangazi University, Turkey, 2011 - 2018.
-   M.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2026 - ongoing.

## Employements

1.  Ministry of Health, Industrial Engineer, 2020-ongoing.

## Internships

1.  TULOMSAS, Intern in Production Planning, 2013

2.  Ford Otosan, Intern in Production Planning, 2016

3.  Bisteks Textil, Intern in Marketing Management, 2017

# Competencies

Minitab, R, Quarto., Git, Github

# I Enjoy

![Skiing](assets/images/kayakgif.gif){width="50"} Skiing

![Tennis](assets/images/tenisgif.gif){width="50"} playing tennis

![Dancing](assets/images/dansgif.gif){width="50"} Dancing

# Links

[CV](assets/cv_dosyan.pdf)
